=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (6:45-6:78) TS377026: This code uses `JSON.parse` or `JSON.stringify`. Use `Schema.parseJson(Schema.Unknown)` for unknown shapes or `Schema.parseJson(schema)` for known ones. effect(preferSchemaOverJson)
  Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for entire file"

[D2] (9:31-9:41) TS377022: The `catch` callback in `Effect.try` returns the global `Error` type. Untagged errors merge together in the Effect error channel and lose type-level distinction; a tagged error preserves that distinction and can wrap the original error in a `cause` property. effect(globalErrorInEffectCatch)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for entire file"

[D3] (10:14-10:47) TS377026: This code uses `JSON.parse` or `JSON.stringify`. Use `Schema.parseJson(Schema.Unknown)` for unknown shapes or `Schema.parseJson(schema)` for known ones. effect(preferSchemaOverJson)
  Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for entire file"

[D4] (11:16-11:44) TS377023: Global 'Error' loses type safety as untagged errors merge together in the Effect failure channel. Consider using a tagged error and optionally wrapping the original in a 'cause' property. effect(globalErrorInEffectFailure)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectFailure for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalErrorInEffectFailure for entire file"

[D5] (15:49-15:80) TS377026: This code uses `JSON.parse` or `JSON.stringify`. Use `Schema.parseJson(Schema.Unknown)` for unknown shapes or `Schema.parseJson(schema)` for known ones. effect(preferSchemaOverJson)
  Fix 0: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable preferSchemaOverJson for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for entire file"
